_meta.notes: Aetna routes through Evicore but has special exceptions: HMO referral requirement, dual submission for outlier plans, and Meritain subsidiary detection.

referral.notes: Some Aetna HMO plans require PCP referral. Check via Availity. Submit referral using PCP NPI + Facility NPI ONLY.

special_rules.description: Some Aetna outlier plans require auth through BOTH Evicore AND Availity
special_rules.action: If Evicore returns 'No Auth Required', also submit in Availity

special_rules.description: Some 'Aetna' plans are actually Meritain Health (Aetna subsidiary)
special_rules.action: Check card/eligibility for Meritain indicators -- use separate Meritain workflow

flags.trigger: aetna AND plan_type == hmo AND benefits_show_referral_required
flags.message: Aetna HMO requires PCP referral before any testing
Submit in Availity anyway -- some Aetna plans only route through Availity
